name: Three-Cheese Tortellini
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup grated Parmesan or Romano cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook tortellini according to package directions; drain.
2. Heat margarine in a 3-quart saucepan over medium heat.
3. Cook bell pepper, shallots, and garlic in the margarine for about 3 minutes.
4. Stir in flour and black pepper. Cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture is bubbly. Remove from heat.
5. Stir in milk. Heat to boiling, stirring constantly. Boil and stir for 1 minute; remove from heat.
6. Stir in mozzarella and Swiss cheeses until melted. Add tortellini and stir until coated.
7. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese. Serve 5 servings (about 1 cup each); 390 calories per serving.
